VolunteerProfile.title: VolunteerProfile
VolunteerProfile.description: Represents a volunteer's profile, including their personal information, skills, and location, used for matching with tasks.

id.description: Unique identifier for the VolunteerProfile entity.

name.description: The full name of the volunteer.

skills.description: A list of key skills the volunteer possesses.

location.description: The geographical location of the volunteer.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate for map visualization.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate for map visualization.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the volunteer profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the volunteer profile was last updated.

Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents a task or need submitted by an organization or individual, requiring volunteer assistance.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Task entity.

title.description: A concise title for the task.

description.description: A detailed description of the help required, potentially enhanced by an AI assistant.

category.description: The sector or type of aid required.

skillsRequired.description: A list of skills necessary to complete the task.

location.description: The geographical location where the task needs to be performed.

latitude.description: The latitude coordinate for map visualization.

longitude.description: The longitude coordinate for map visualization.

urgency.description: The urgency level of the task ('high', 'medium', 'low').

priority.description: A numerical representation of urgency (3 for high, 2 for medium, 1 for low).

status.description: The current status of the task (e.g., 'open', 'assigned', 'completed', 'cancelled').

submittedBy.description: The name of the organization or individual who submitted the task.

contactEmail.description: The contact email for the organization or NGO.

assignedTo.description: The name of the volunteer assigned to this task.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the task was submitted.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the task was last updated.

ActivityLog.title: ActivityLog
ActivityLog.description: A real-time log of humanitarian activities across the system.

message.description: The descriptive message of the event.
